name: Lisa Phillips
role: Toby Devan Lewis Director, New Museum (parent org); NEW INC co-founder
notes: Stepping down April 2026 after 27-year directorship; co-founded NEW INC with Karen Wong in 2014; held seat on Rhizome board; FY2025 reportable comp ~$825030

name: Karen Wong
role: Deputy Director, New Museum; NEW INC co-founder
notes: Co-founded NEW INC with Phillips; remains Deputy Director

name: Marcia Tucker
notes: Founded New Museum 1977; predecessor to Phillips. Not directly involved with NEW INC (founded 2014 after her 1999 departure)

name: Julia Kaganskiy
notes: Built NEW INC from launch through Year 5; previously Global Editor of VICE The Creators Project (2010-2014); founded ArtsTech meetup 2008; subsequently freelance + Curatorial Advisor for NEW INC artist residency w/Nokia Bell Labs; named Eyebeam ED April 6 2026 (sibling-org connection across two AC dossiers)

name: Stephanie Pereira
notes: Joined July 2 2018 from Kickstarter (where she was first director of arts program then director of creator engagement); served three years

name: Salome Asega
notes: Appointed July 26 2021; previously inaugural New Media Art Research Fellow for Creativity and Free Expression at Ford Foundation (4 yrs); MFA Parsons Design+Technology; teaches at Parsons; Ethiopian-American; raised in Las Vegas; Eyebeam alum + Rhizome board (sibling-org cross-tie)

name: Toby Devan Lewis
notes: The directorship is the "Toby Devan Lewis Directorship" — a named, endowed seat at the New Museum. Phillips holds it

name: Eric Mack
notes: Listed in NEW INC mentor archive (year-7-mentors page exists)
